_comment: This file is the source of truth for status.auditgraph.ai. Edit by hand for pilot phase; automate via a monitoring agent later (BetterStack, statuspage.io). All times in ISO 8601 UTC. To declare an incident: add to incidents[] with status='investigating', update components affected. To resolve: change status to 'resolved' and add a final update.

components.name: Discovery Pipeline
components.description: Azure / AWS / GCP discovery scans + scheduled runs

components.name: Primary Database
components.description: PostgreSQL cluster (Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server)

_example_incident_for_reference_only.title: Elevated API response times on identity list endpoint

updates.message: We're investigating reports of slow response times on the /api/identities endpoint. Other endpoints unaffected.
